name: Warm Green Bean and Pancetta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh rosemary or 1 1/2 teaspoons dried, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender. Drain.
2. Rinse with cold water and drain well. Pat dry.
- This can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Chill.
3. Cook the pancetta in a heavy large skillet over medium heat until crisp, stirring often.
4. Transfer the pancetta to paper towels using a slotted spoon. Pour off all but 1 1/2 tablespoons fat from the skillet.
5. Add shallots and chopped rosemary to the skillet and cook over medium heat for 2 minutes, stirring often.
6. Add beans and stir to coat. Add oil and lemon juice and stir until the beans are heated through.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with pancetta.
8. Garnish with rosemary sprigs if desired.
